entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.

Personally identifiable ìwífún lè fi kún, ṣùgbọ́n jẹ́ kì í ṣe limited láti: Email adirẹsi ti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àti òbí àkọ́kọ́ orúkọ àti last orúkọ ti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àti òbí Phone number ti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àti òbí adirẹsi, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School orúkọ Class cookies àti data Lílo a lè lo tirẹ data láti kan sí ìwọ pẹ̀lú newsletters, marketing tàbí promotional àwọn ohun èlò àti míì ìwífún yẹn lè interest ìwọ. ìwọ lè yan-out ti receiving eyikeyii, tàbí gbogbo, ti wọ̀nyí communications láti wa nípasẹ̀ títẹ̀lé unsubscribe ìjápọ̀. data Lílo, a lè pẹ̀lú kó jọ ìwífún yẹn tirẹ browser sends whenever ìwọ bẹ̀wò wa iṣẹ́ tàbí nígbà tí ìwọ access iṣẹ́ nípasẹ̀ tàbí nípasẹ̀ eyikeyii ẹ̀rọ (“data Lílo”). yìí data Lílo lè fi kún ìwífún such gẹ́gẹ́ bí tirẹ computer’s Internet Protocol adirẹsi (e.g. IP adirẹsi), browser irú, browser ẹ̀dà, àwọn ojú-ìwé ti wa iṣẹ́ yẹn ìwọ bẹ̀wò, àkókò àti ọjọ́ ti tirẹ bẹ̀wò, àkókò spent lórí ìwọ̀nyẹn àwọn ojú-ìwé, aláìlẹ́gbẹ́ ẹ̀rọ identifiers àti míì diagnostic data. nígbà tí ìwọ access iṣẹ́ pẹ̀lú ẹ̀rọ, yìí data Lílo lè fi kún ìwífún such gẹ́gẹ́ bí irú ti ẹ̀rọ ìwọ lo, tirẹ ẹ̀rọ aláìlẹ́gbẹ́ ID, IP adirẹsi ti tirẹ ẹ̀rọ, tirẹ ẹ̀rọ operating eto, irú ti Internet browser ìwọ lo, aláìlẹ́gbẹ́ ẹ̀rọ identifiers àti míì diagnostic data.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Àgbáyé History ní gbogbo points ti àkókò ní ti jẹ́ like zooming out ti picture, picture yẹn kept changing. centuries leading up láti 19th century marked turning point nínú human ìtàn, gẹ́gẹ́ bí àgbáyé moved láti flat, limited ìwòye ti àgbáyé láti growing ìlóye ti new territories àti colonies. French Revolution marked àkọ́kọ́ àkókò nígbà tí large olùgbé gathered láti protest àti establish ideals ti liberty, equality, àti fraternity. events ti àgbáyé War II pẹ̀lú shaped àgbáyé fún tó kàn century àti laid foundation fún 21st century.
